title: Heidi Swapp's Minc
excerpt: Feeling way behind on sharing several things I have on my phone, for example this video taken at CHA back in January. It was shot on the fly by Kim Jeffries . Jack was 16 months at the time and…
body: Feeling way behind on sharing several things I have on my phone, for example this video taken at CHA back in January. It was shot on the fly by Kim Jeffries. Jack was 16 months at the time and showed tons of enthusiasm as Heidi demonstrated the amazing Minc foil applicator. We didn't plan on wearing matching sweaters or even filming this video, but hope you enjoy it regardless.
